description_long: This bungalow features a prominent, dark gabled roof with multiple peaks and dormers, giving it a classic suburban appearance. The facade is symmetrical, with a central entrance flanked by large windows and a covered porch area. The property is enclosed by a low fence and includes a driveway leading to a detached garage on one side. Two mature trees and a circular feature, possibly a fountain or planter, are situated in the front yard, enhancing curb appeal. The exterior walls are finished in a light, neutral color, contrasting with the dark roof and trim. The overall layout is spacious, with a clear separation between the main house, garage, and landscaped yard.
description: A classic bungalow with a dark gabled roof, symmetrical facade, covered porch, detached garage, and landscaped front yard with trees and a circular feature.
description_view_0: Side view showing the dark gabled roof, detached garage, and fenced yard with two trees in the front.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the symmetrical facade, central entrance, covered porch, and circular feature between two trees.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the garage, driveway, and the rear portion of the fenced property.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back entrance, extended roofline, and the full depth of the property layout.
